very_drunk.speaker: Craig
very_drunk.text: Craig shakes his head. 'Nope. You're a liability right now, Dave. Come back when you can walk a straight line. I don't need witnesses slurring my name.'

buzzed.speaker: Craig
buzzed.text: You been drinking? Keep it together, Dave. I need reliable.

too_hot.speaker: Craig
too_hot.text: Not today. Unmarked car was on the street this morning. You head back inside.

craig_sees_drugs.speaker: Craig
craig_sees_drugs.text: Craig squints. 'Your eyes, man. What have you been doing?' He takes a step back. 'Come back when you've ... resolved whatever that is.'

morning_intro.speaker: Craig
morning_intro.text: Craig barely looks up. 'I'm busy, Dave. Got a thing. Come back after lunch.'

late_afternoon_intro.speaker: Craig
late_afternoon_intro.text: 'Gotta move FAST, Dave. Truck's gotta be loaded by 5. You in?'

already_helped_drunk.speaker: Craig
already_helped_drunk.text: Craig physically blocks the truck. 'Not today, brother. You can't even stand.'

already_helped_cash.speaker: Craig
already_helped_cash.text: Craig nods approvingly. 'You've been making moves. I can use a man with resources.'

already_helped_heroic.speaker: Craig
already_helped_heroic.text: Craig looks at you sideways. 'Heard you got soft. That true?' His hand stays on the boxes.

already_helped_default.speaker: Craig
already_helped_default.text: Craig nods at the truck. 'Got another run if you're interested. Pays better this time. Meet me at the sketchy end of town.' He doesn't clarify which end. You both know.

intro.speaker: Craig
intro.text: Hey. Need a hand loading the truck. Heavy stuff. Don't ask what's in them.

beats.speaker: Craig
beats.text: "Auto parts. Just auto parts. Don't overthink it, Dave."

beats.speaker: Dad
beats.text: You squat. You lift. Your knees file a formal complaint.
CLANK. One box shifts. The sound is... rectangular. Oiled. Wrong.

beats.speaker: Craig
beats.text: He doesn't blink. He hands you fifty bucks. The bills are warm.

beats.speaker: Dad
beats.text: You don't ask. You will never ask. This is the deal.

decline.text: Craig shrugs. 'Suit yourself.' He loads the boxes alone with suspicious ease.
